content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION 
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329 
Ryan Hodge 
Assistant City Attorney 
City of Santa Ana 
20 Civic Center Plaza M-29 
Santa Ana, California 92702 
(916) 322-5660 • Fait (916) 322-0886 
December 11, 2012 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice dated September 25, 2012 
Our File No. W-12-145 
Dear Mr. Hodge: 
The purpose of this correspondence is to confirm that since we have not received 
word from you since our last correspondence, we have withdrawn your request for 
advice. 
ln our correspondence dated October 23, 2012 (copy enclosed), we advised that 
unless we received word from you by November 2, 2012 we would be withdrawing your 
request for advice. On November 2, you requested and we agreed to an extension of the 
deadline of two weeks. Having not received the requested information, we have 
withdrawn you request for advice. 
However, if at a later date you determine that you do desire advice, you may 
simply request it anew at that time. 
VJ:jgl 
Enclosure 
Sincerely, 
--y 9- 
Valentina Joyce 
Counsel, Legal Division

sections.question_synthetic: No substantive legal question; this is a procedural withdrawal notice regarding a previously submitted advice request.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC has withdrawn the requestor's advice request dated September 25, 2012, due to failure to provide requested information by the extended November 16, 2012 deadline, but notes that a new request may be submitted at any time.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no substantive Q/C sections; document confirms prior October 23, 2012 correspondence and November 2 extension agreement; purely procedural in nature.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: No substantive legal question; this is a procedural withdrawal notice regarding a previously submitted advice request.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC has withdrawn the requestor's advice request dated September 25, 2012, due to failure to provide requested information by the extended November 16, 2012 deadline, but notes that a new request may be submitted at any time.

embedding.summary: The FPPC notifies Assistant City Attorney Ryan Hodge that his September 25, 2012 request for advice (File No. W-12-145) has been withdrawn due to non-receipt of requested information after an extended deadline of November 16, 2012.
